allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Gavnbo\\.vscode\\gyserguiden" -Recurse | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\Users\\Gavnbo\\.vscode\\gyserguiden\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell($env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'git' }; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"\) { "Git fundet: C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" } elseif \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"\) { "Git fundet \(x86\)" } else { "Git ikke fundet i standard stier" })

PowerShell(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe git 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Gavnbo\\AppData\\Local\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'git' })
